evals.name: single-file-scan
evals.expected_output: Structured violation report with table, fix suggestions, and summary for bulkTransfer/index.js
expectations: Report contains a violations table with Line, Severity, Rule, Issue columns
Detects deprecated-logger if uppercase Logger variable is used
Fix suggestions use lowercase logger, never uppercase Logger
Fix suggestions never include err.message in log calls
Report ends with a summary line showing error and warning counts

evals.name: mixed-pattern-file
evals.expected_output: Detailed violation report for a large file with mixed Logger/logger patterns, child loggers, and error handling
expectations: Detects deprecated-logger for uppercase Logger usage
Detects losing-error-stack for err.message interpolation patterns
Groups related violations on the same line into single table rows
Does not flag correct logger.child() usage as a violation

evals.name: severity-filter
evals.expected_output: Filtered report showing only Error-severity violations, no warnings
expectations: Report only shows Error-severity violations, no Warning rows in the table
Still produces a valid violations table with correct columns
Summary line reflects filtered results (errors only, 0 warnings or warnings omitted)
